name: Double Layer Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Vanilla pudding mix (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the cream cheese, 1 tablespoon milk, and sugar with a wire whisk until smooth.
2. Stir in the Cool whip.
3. Spread the mixture into the bottom of the crust.
4. In another bowl, mix the pudding mix and cold milk until thickened. Add pumpkin and spices; stir until well combined.
5. Spread the pudding mixture over the cream cheese layer.
6. Top with remaining whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon.
7. Refrigerate for 4 hours to set.
